---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Platform**
- [ ] Windows
- [ ] macOS

**OS Version**
e.g. Windows 11 22H2 / macOS Ventura 13.4

**Script version**
e.g. 1.0.0

**Action being run**
- [ ] Add
- [ ] Remove
- [ ] Check

**Parameters used**
```
-Action Add -IP x.x.x.x -Hostname example.local
```

**Expected behaviour**
What you expected to happen.

**Actual behaviour**
What actually happened.

**Ninja activity log output**
```
Paste the full log output here
```

**Additional context**
Any other relevant details.
